config.neo4j.topic.cypher.ctsserver.CTS_DataCen: call apoc.do.case([event.op = 'c','MERGE (n:Evidence { EvidenceID: event.after.EvidenceID }) ON CREATE SET n = event.after RETURN n',event.op = 'u','MATCH (n:Evidence { EvidenceID: event.before.EvidenceID }) SET n = event.after RETURN n',event.op = 'd','MATCH (n:Evidence { EvidenceID: event.before.EvidenceID }) SET n:NeedDelete'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value
config.neo4j.topic.cypher.ctsserver.CTS_Admin.S: call apoc.do.case([event.op = 'c','MERGE (n:Subscriber {SubscriberID: event.after.SubscriberID }) ON CREATE SET n = event.after RETURN n',event.op = 'u','MATCH (n:Subscriber {SubscriberID: event.before.SubscriberID }) SET n = event.after RETURN n',event.op = 'd','MATCH (n:Subscriber { SubscriberID: event.before.SubscriberID }) SET n:NeedDelete'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value
